fn parse_command(input: &str) -> Result<Command, Error> {
    match input {
        "start" => Ok(Command::Start),
        "stop" => Ok(Command::Stop),
        "restart" => Ok(Command::Restart),
        other => Err(Error::UnknownCommand(other.to_string())),
    }
}

fn get_priority(level: &str) -> Result<u8, Error> {
    match level {
        "low" => Ok(1),
        "medium" => Ok(2),
        "high" => Ok(3),
        "critical" => Ok(4),
        other => Err(Error::InvalidPriority(other.to_string())),
    }
}

fn process_response(resp: &Response) -> Result<String, Error> {
    match resp.status {
        200 => Ok("ok".to_string()),
        404 => Ok("not found".to_string()),
        500 => Ok("server error".to_string()),
        code => Err(Error::UnexpectedStatus(code)),
    }
}

enum Command { Start, Stop, Restart }
struct Response { status: u16 }
enum Error { UnknownCommand(String), InvalidPriority(String), UnexpectedStatus(u16) }
